title: Starmer is a symptom of Britain’s deeper malaise
summary_full: Britain must decide whether it prefers substantially lower public spending or substantially higher taxes. Without clarity on these core questions, it will remain stuck in economic limbo
summary_public: Britain must decide whether it prefers substantially lower public spending or substantially higher taxes. Without clarity on these core questions, it will remain stuck in economic limbo

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Britain must decide whether it prefers substantially lower public spending
